meta-content-stat-card.name: Meta / Content / Stat Card
meta-content-stat-card.description: Data callout card with value, trend indicator, and label. Used in presentations for KPI highlights.

meta-chrome-theme-card.name: Meta / Chrome / Theme Card
meta-chrome-theme-card.description: Theme-branded card with colored accent bar. Used in component-brief for theme comparison views (Actian/Studio/Explorer). Detach to append content.

meta-chrome-feedback.name: Meta / Chrome / Feedback
meta-chrome-feedback.description: Annotation component for designer feedback and library gap markers. Designer variant: place next to issues for /refine comments. System variant: auto-placed when plugin improvises around a library gap.

meta-content-do-don-t-pair.name: Meta / Content / Do-Don't Pair
meta-content-do-don-t-pair.description: Side-by-side Do and Don't examples with green/red color bars. Used in component-brief Cards 6-7 and presentation best-practice slides.

Do Label#9:8.default: Do — Use sentence case for all UI labels

Don't Label#9:9.default: Don't — Use ALL CAPS for labels

meta-chrome-brief-card.name: Meta / Chrome / Brief Card
meta-chrome-brief-card.description: Card shell for component spec pages. 4 variants: DS Standard (1200px grey header), DS Page Header (1200px white with logo), FM Standard (820px grey header), FM Page Header (820px dark).

meta-chrome-flow-screen.name: Meta / Chrome / Flow Screen
meta-chrome-flow-screen.description: Screen frame for wireframe flows. Composes FM App_header + FM Side navigation bar + Content Area. Standard (1440x960) and Compact (1440x700).

meta-chrome-accessibility-card.name: Meta / Chrome / Accessibility Card
meta-chrome-accessibility-card.description: Container for WCAG requirements with severity badges. Used in component-brief Cards 7-8. Detach instance before appending content to the Content slot.

meta-content-dimension-annotation.name: Meta / Content / Dimension Annotation
meta-content-dimension-annotation.description: Measurement annotation with endcaps and value label. Used in component-brief Card 3 (Anatomy - Specs) for dimension callouts between elements.

meta-content-pointer-badge.name: Meta / Content / Pointer Badge
meta-content-pointer-badge.description: Dimension callout label with directional line. Used in component-brief Card 3 (Anatomy) for pink dimension annotations.

meta-content-contrast-badge.name: Meta / Content / Contrast Badge
meta-content-contrast-badge.description: WCAG contrast result badge (Pass/Exempt/Fail). Used in component-brief Card 8 accessibility contrast table.

meta-content-color-swatch.name: Meta / Content / Color Swatch
meta-content-color-swatch.description: Circular color indicator. Used in component-brief Card 4 (token tables) and Card 8 (contrast tables). Bind fill to a DS2026 variable at runtime.

meta-template-table-data-row.name: Meta / Template / Table Data Row
meta-template-table-data-row.description: Hidden template for table data rows. Skills clone and fill text slots via the template engine. Do not use directly.

meta-template-state-column.name: Meta / Template / State Column
meta-template-state-column.description: Hidden template for state grid columns. Skills clone, fill title, replace content placeholder. Do not use directly.

meta-content-research-frame.name: Meta / Content / Research Frame
meta-content-research-frame.description: Container for research findings in presentations. Shows title, source attribution, and content area.

meta-utility-card-divider.name: Meta / Utility / Card Divider
meta-utility-card-divider.description: Horizontal divider line between card sections. Set layoutSizingHorizontal = 'FILL' on instances to fill parent width.

meta-chrome-brief-card-header.name: Meta / Chrome / Brief Card Header
meta-chrome-brief-card-header.description: Card header for component briefs. Used as first child inside Brief Card shells. Set Title, Subtitle, and Show Subtitle via properties — do not detach.

meta-template-section-header.name: Meta / Template / Section Header
meta-template-section-header.description: Hidden template for section headers with title and subtitle. Skills clone and fill text slots. Do not use directly.

meta-chrome-generation-log.name: Meta / Chrome / Generation Log
meta-chrome-generation-log.description: Generation metadata card. First element in every AI-generated output. Shows skill name, prompt, timestamp, duration, model, and plugin version.

Prompt#3:1.default: Prompt: Create a component brief for Button

meta-slide-body-full.name: Meta / Slide / Body Full
meta-slide-body-full.description: Presentation slide template. Used by generate-presentation skill.

meta-slide-cover.name: Meta / Slide / Cover
meta-slide-cover.description: Presentation slide template. Used by generate-presentation skill.

meta-slide-body-text-visual.name: Meta / Slide / Body Text Visual
meta-slide-body-text-visual.description: Presentation slide template. Used by generate-presentation skill.

meta-slide-back-cover.name: Meta / Slide / Back Cover
meta-slide-back-cover.description: Presentation slide template. Used by generate-presentation skill.

meta-slide-section.name: Meta / Slide / Section
meta-slide-section.description: Presentation slide template. Used by generate-presentation skill.

meta-content-code-block.name: Meta / Content / Code Block
meta-content-code-block.description: Dark code block for CSS, HTML, ARIA code examples. Used in component-brief Card 9 and presentation code slides. Toggle Show Header for filename/language label.

meta-template-table-header-row.name: Meta / Template / Table Header Row
meta-template-table-header-row.description: Hidden template for table header rows. Skills clone and fill text slots via the template engine. Do not use directly.

meta-chrome-flow-cover-card.name: Meta / Chrome / Flow Cover Card
meta-chrome-flow-cover-card.description: Dark cover card at the start of each sub-flow. Shows Feature, Flow, and User fields on a dark background.

meta-template-swatch-row.name: Meta / Template / Swatch Row
meta-template-swatch-row.description: Hidden template for color swatch rows. Skills clone, fill text slots, bind swatch fill to variable. Do not use directly.

_meta.hybrid_note: The 'templates' object at the bottom of this file is hand-curated and preserved across syncs by scripts/sync/sync-from-figma.js. Everything else is regenerated from Figma. Edit only the templates block.
